description.ko: 끊임없이 내리는 빗줄기 사이로 네온 사인이 빛나는 미래 지향적 대도시의 숨막히는 전경으로, 사이버네틱 건축과 도시 밀집도의 정점을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic metropolis where neon lights pierce through the constant rain, showcasing the peak of cybernetic architecture and urban density.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain, glowing neon signs in teal and magenta, futuristic skyscrapers with holographic billboards, flying cars with light trails, wet pavement reflecting city lights, highly detailed, 8k resolution, futuristic noir atmosphere.
